favorite_teams.description: ESPN team abbreviations to track, e.g. PHI, NYY, DET

update_interval_seconds.description: How often to poll ESPN when no game is live

live_update_interval_seconds.description: How often to poll ESPN while a favorite team's game is live

display_duration.description: Seconds to show this plugin per rotation

away_color.description: RGB fallback color for the away team block (top-left)

home_color.description: RGB fallback color for the home team block (bottom-left)

use_team_colors.description: Pull each team's real primary color from ESPN instead of using the fallback colors above

show_logos.description: Show each team's logo at the far left of its color block

logo_dir.description: Path (relative to the LEDMatrix install root) to bundled team logo PNGs, named e.g. PHI.png. Falls back to downloading from ESPN if a team's file isn't found here.

test_mode.description: Render a fake in-progress game instead of calling ESPN (for layout testing)
